trigger.Name: trFirstSpawn
trigger.script:
CreateVehicleEx("Cumbine01","Cumbine_1", CVector(1395.703, 267, 3457.095), 1065) CreateVehicleEx("Cumbine01","Cumbine_2", CVector(3575.703, 298, 2829.095), 1065) CreateVehicleEx("Cumbine01","Cumbine_3", CVector(3463.703, 302, 2854.095), 1065) CreateVehicleEx("BelazCaravan","CaravanHost_1", CVector(1773.703, 267, 2500.095), 1065) CreateVehicleEx("BelazCaravan","CaravanHost_2", CVector(1817.703, 267, 2541.095), 1065)
local vehCarav1 = GetEntityByName("CaravanHost_1") if vehCarav1 then vehCarav1:SetCruisingSpeed(15) vehCarav1:SetExternalPathByName("CaravanHost") end
local vehCarav2 = GetEntityByName("CaravanHost_2") if vehCarav2 then vehCarav2:SetCruisingSpeed(15) vehCarav2:SetExternalPathByName("CaravanHost") end
local vehFarm1 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_1") if vehFarm1 then vehFarm1:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain3") end
local vehFarm2 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_2") if vehFarm2 then vehFarm2:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain1") end
local vehFarm3 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_3") if vehFarm3 then vehFarm3:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain2") end
TActivate("trPovtorMarchruta_1") TActivate("trPovtorMarchruta_2") TActivate("trPovtorMarchruta_3") TActivate("trPovtorMarchruta_4") TActivate("trPovtorMarchruta_5")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trPovtorMarchruta_1
trigger.script: local vehCarav11 = GetEntityByName("CaravanHost_1") if vehCarav11 then vehCarav11:SetCruisingSpeed(15) vehCarav11:SetExternalPathByName("CaravanHost") end

trigger.Name: trPovtorMarchruta_2
trigger.script: local vehCarav22 = GetEntityByName("CaravanHost_2") if vehCarav22 then vehCarav22:SetCruisingSpeed(15) vehCarav22:SetExternalPathByName("CaravanHost") end

trigger.Name: trPovtorMarchruta_3
trigger.script: local vehFarm11 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_1") if vehFarm11 then vehFarm11:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain3") end

trigger.Name: trPovtorMarchruta_4
trigger.script: local vehFarm22 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_2") if vehFarm22 then vehFarm22:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain1") end

trigger.Name: trPovtorMarchruta_5
trigger.script: local vehFarm33 = GetEntityByName("Cumbine_3") if vehFarm33 then vehFarm33:SetExternalPathByName("Cumbain2") end

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap15
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8800" ) if b == 1 then PassToMap("r1m5", "FromR1M1", -1 ) trigger:Deactivate() else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap15") end

trigger.Name: ActivatePerexod
trigger.script:
local a = GetEntityByName("ToR4M1") if a then a:SetProperty("Active",1) end
SpawnMessageBox( "8804" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap41
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8802" ) if b == 1 then CompleteQuest("Port_quest2") PassToMap("r4m1", "FromR1M1", -1 ) trigger:Deactivate() else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap41") end
